description:
This quiz tests intermediate knowledge of modern CSS concepts through multiple-choice questions, assessing practical skills relevant to real-world web development scenarios. The tone is engaging and slightly playful, using emojis and rhetorical questions to challenge participants' confidence in their CSS expertise.
Topics: CSS syntax, Flexbox/Grid layout, Responsive design, CSS variables, Advanced selectors, Best practices
Audience: Web developers with foundational CSS knowledge seeking to validate their skills for job applications or professional growth
